• Message-schedule values W[0]..W[15] (L0003–L0018) were re-derived from the message in L0001; W[16]..W[63] were regenerated with the small σ functions and all match the dump (L0019–L0066).

Because every elementary operation is correct and there is no point at which the trace becomes inconsistent, no single-bit corruption occurred.

VERDICT: GENUINE
